description: Canonical catalog of on-device models and minimum device requirements for the CUST/OS starter kit. Consumed by custos-web's one-click installer at custos.nimbusxr.us/install. The repo's install.sh does not read this file — it installs whatever is physically present in models/ on the local clone.

models.title: Gemma 4 E2B-it
models.notes: Requires accepting the Gemma license on Hugging Face. Must be in .litertlm format — LiteRT-LM does not load GGUF.

models.title: Nomic Embed v1.5 (Q8_0)
models.purpose: Embeddings for skill selection and RAG (on-device-embed provider)

requirements.minRamBytesDescription: 6 GB of RAM. The on-device LLM (Gemma 4 E2B-it) needs ~2 GB of model weights plus headroom for ATAK and the inference runtime. Devices with less RAM will either OOM during inference or swap aggressively.
requirements.minStorageBytesDescription: 3 GB free on /sdcard. The three on-device models total ~2.3 GB, plus skills, config, and scratches.
requirements.minAndroidSdkDescription: Android 10 (SDK 29). Older Androids lack APIs the plugin uses.
requirements.requiredArchitecturesDescription: The APK and on-device model runtimes ship as arm64 only. x86_64 emulators and 32-bit ARM devices are not supported.

notes.failureGuidance: If a device fails a requirement, the operator has alternatives: run a smaller on-device model (edit the provider URL in custos.yaml), route chat to a LAN/command-post HTTP provider over the mesh, or add a cloud provider. The CUST/OS plugin itself runs on any Android 10+ arm64 device — only the on-device LLM has meaningful hardware demands.
